narrative:
Plain Township has 9,947 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points.
